title: Whole Cake Island Approach — Chapter 826
main_description: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 184 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
key_events: The Route to Big Mom’s Territory
The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
